# LifeTracker

> A comprehensive time management, habit tracking, and personal development platform.

## Core Features
- **To-do List**: Task prioritization, sub-tasks management, and visual progress tracking.
- **Habit Tracker**: Build discipline through streak models and calendar check-ins.
- **Smart Calendar**: Time-blocking interface to manage schedules, events, and deadlines.
- **Journal**: Secure space for personal notes, emotions, and media attachments.
- **Timer**: Pomodoro countdown timer to maximize focus and productivity.

## System Architecture
- **Frontend**: ReactJS, Bootstrap CSS, Single Page Application (SPA).
- **Backend**: High-speed RESTful API with real-time data queries.

## Navigation Links
- [Home Page](https://life-tracker-pi-three.vercel.app/)
- [Login Page](https://life-tracker-pi-three.vercel.app/login)
- [Register Page](https://life-tracker-pi-three.vercel.app/register)
